prompt: Tap flop middle to anchor blocker in range context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before range action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the board anchor because the central flop card starts the blocker-adjusted texture read between both ranges.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The middle flop card is the correct board cue because the blocker-adjusted texture read starts from the board card that sits between both ranges.
